title: Microsoft worker emails employees about company's support of Israel
abstract: Did you hear that Microsoft sent an email to its employees supporting Israel? It’s the kind of insider scoop you’d want to share with your coworkers. Dive in and find out what all the buzz is about!
abstract_zh: 听说微软给员工发邮件支持以色列了？这事儿你得知道！就像是你手握最新鲜的八卦，迫不及待地想和同事分享。快来一窥究竟吧！
